name: Aegis-7 'Spectre' Psionic Interceptor

electronics.sensor_notes: Medium Tactical Ultra-Scanner: 30-mile scan, 3-mile imaging; 360. Hyperspectral Distributed Sensors: +9 nightvision, +3 to notice details, x8 magnification. Distortion Jammer: -4 ECM penalty to enemy missiles, +2 to jam missiles. Adaptive Signature: Nanopolymer hull grants -2 penalty to all enemy detection/lock rolls. Tactical ESM: +1 dodge missiles. Decoy Launcher: +1 dodge missiles.

logistics.endurance: Trader Drive Rating 2.5 (45 LY/hr; 4 hour recharge between jumps; -4 Navigation (Hyperspace))

weapons.notes: Winglet-mounted Flamer Cannons. Linked pair: total ROF 12 (+3). Strip shields with Surge effect, 2-round shield recovery delay.
Point-Defense (+3 intercept). With Psiberface: automatic Wait (Point Defense) each turn without costing pilot action. Linked pair: total ROF 4.
Center-mounted. Ignores hull DR, blocked by shields, targets pilot directly with toxic damage. Requires Orphean Psiberface to fire.

description: The Spectre is a matte-black, needle-shaped interceptor that looks like a predatory insect made of shadow. Its four retractable landing legs (4RL) allow it to perch tall like the Hornet. The central fuselage houses the pilot's Bio-Feedback Cradle (counts as high-G seat, +3 HT vs High-G) and the high-precision Ghost Beam aperture. Inside, the pilot experiences 'One with the Machine' — no screens, almost no interface; the pilot feels the ship's sensors as their own sight and the Surge of the Flamer Cannons as a rush of heat in their own limbs. The Spectre utilizes a 'Melt and Ghost' tactical loop: the winglet-mounted Flamer Cannons strip shields, allowing the center-mounted Ghost Beam to target the pilot directly. The Aegis-7 is the product of a clandestine partnership between House Mistral and the Klikaklak Guildfleet — a Maradonian heart beating inside a cold, alien, Trader-built ribcage.
